mnemonics: DIVE into Continuous EDA: Describe, Investigate, Visualize, Evaluate
keyPoints: Continuous Evaluation is an ongoing process, not a one-time task.
It involves iterative cycles of analysis, visualization, and hypothesis testing.
The goal is to build and maintain a deep, evolving understanding of the dataset throughout a project.
commonMistakes: Treating EDA as a single initial step rather than a continuous process.
Failing to re-evaluate data quality and assumptions after new data arrives or the model changes.
Ignoring the feedback loop between model performance and exploratory analysis.
